user.title: Set up Hargassner
user.description: Enter your Hargassner web account credentials and installation ID.

data_description.email: Your Hargassner web portal email address
data_description.installation_id: Numeric ID found in the URL when logged in at web.hargassner.at: .../installations/{id}/...

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Hargassner
reauth_confirm.description: Your Hargassner credentials are no longer valid. Please re-enter them.
